meta.title: Goon — Describe your business, get a live page in seconds.
meta.description: Goon turns a one-line description into a polished, conversion-ready landing page — copy, layout, and design handled. You just ship.

hero.headline: Describe your business. Get a live page in seconds.
hero.subhead: Goon turns a one-line description into a polished, conversion-ready landing page — copy, layout, and design handled. You just ship.

features.headline: Everything you need to ship a page that converts
features.subhead: One tool replaces the designer, the copywriter, and the deploy pipeline.

items.title: One-line generation
items.description: Describe your business in plain English. Goon writes the copy, picks the layout, applies the design.
items.label: 01 / GENERATION

items.title: Conversion-tested templates
items.description: Every generated page is structured around a proven landing page anatomy: hero, social proof, features, pricing, FAQ, CTA.
items.label: 02 / TEMPLATES

items.title: Live editor
items.description: Tweak any section in-place. Changes render in real time. No rebuilds, no deploys to preview.
items.label: 03 / EDITOR

items.title: Brand controls
items.description: Lock in your colors, fonts, and voice. Every page stays on-brand without manual styling.
items.label: 04 / BRANDING

items.title: One-click publish
items.description: Ship to a goon.page/your-slug URL on a custom domain, or export clean HTML/CSS you can host anywhere.
items.label: 05 / PUBLISH

items.title: Built-in analytics
items.description: See visits, signups, and conversion rate on a single dashboard. No third-party scripts to wire up.
items.label: 06 / ANALYTICS

howItWorks.headline: From idea to live page in three steps.

steps.title: Describe.
steps.description: Type a sentence about what you do and who it's for. Add a link if you have one.

steps.title: Generate.
steps.description: Goon returns a complete page in under ten seconds — copy, layout, and styling, ready to review.

steps.title: Publish.
steps.description: Edit anything you want, hit publish, and share your URL. Custom domains supported on Pro.

demo.headline: Watch Goon build a page.

terminalLines.text: describe: "a notetaking app for engineers who hate markdown"

demo.demoTooltip: Demo mode — join the waitlist to unlock generation

pricing.headline: Simple, ship-day pricing.
pricing.note: Pricing final at launch. Early waitlist members lock in 30% off for life.

items.question: When does Goon launch?
items.answer: We're in private beta now and opening access gradually. Join the waitlist to get an invite.

items.question: Do I need to know how to code?
items.answer: No. Describe your business in plain English. If you can write a tweet, you can use Goon.

items.question: Can I edit the page after it's generated?
items.answer: Yes. Every section is editable in a live preview. Changes save instantly.

items.question: Can I export the code?
items.answer: Pro plans can export clean HTML/CSS and host the page anywhere. Starter plans publish to a goon.page subdomain.

items.question: What about custom domains?
items.answer: Custom domains are included on Pro. Connect any domain you own in two clicks.

items.question: Is my data private?
items.answer: Your briefs and generated pages are private to your account. We don't train on your content.

finalCTA.headline: Ship your page this week.
finalCTA.subhead: Join the waitlist and be among the first to generate a landing page with Goon.
finalCTA.successMessage: Check your inbox for a confirmation.
finalCTA.disclaimer: We'll email you when your invite is ready. No spam, ever.

footer.tagline: Describe your business. Get a live page in seconds.
